title: jungia pubescens var. floribunda
intro: Jungia pubescens var. floribunda, also known as Jungia or Jungle Tea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Jungia pubescens var. floribunda is commonly prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in tinctures, infusions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
